channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-15
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. In the **scienceverse/metacheck** project, Lakens made notable additions to the `data_check` branch, including the ability to process JASP files and implement end-to-end functionality for The OpenScales OSD export. Meanwhile, **MicheleNuijten/statcheck** saw updates to the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, integrating changes from the remote repository. These updates demonstrate the connections between our projects, with **scienceverse/metacheck** and **MicheleNuijten/statcheck** both working towards improved data checking and statistical analysis. Other projects, such as **giladfeldman/docpluck** and **JamieCummins/regcheck**, have also made significant strides, with fixes and updates to various features and functionalities. Additionally, **giladfeldman/escicheck** was synchronized with the `escicheckapp` repository, and **giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward** added a convenient link to the Chrome Webstore for easy installation of the Output-it-Forward extension. Overall, our community is celebrating a period of productive collaboration and progress.

29 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck, oddpub

Most active:

regcheck25 commits
metacheck3 commits
oddpub1 commits

item.title: metacheck: 1 commit today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `data_check` branch was the focus of recent work, with commits from Lakens that added the ability to "process jasp files, better study categorization, better scale extraction" on July 15. On July 13, Lakens made "additions" to the `data_check` branch, although the specifics of these additions were not detailed. Earlier on July 13, Lakens implemented end-to-end functionality for "The OpenScales OSD export", which involved modifications to three files, as part of the work on the `data_check` branch. The work on the `data_check` branch also involved creating the OpenScales OSD export, which now exists from start to finish.

1 commit(s) today:

  • 0a34c42 [data_check] process jasp files, better study categorization, better scale extraction. — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository. The merge commit on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was made to integrate changes from the remote repository. Additionally, on the same `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, administrative updates were made, as indicated by the commit message "admin updates". No other branches were modified in these commits. The changes were made by MicheleNuijten.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: oddpub: 1 commit today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The `main` branch was worked on, where the ontogenerator was updated to include debugging for open data detection in the database for the years 2023-2024. The commit message specifically mentions "debugging open data detection db 2023-2024", indicating that the focus was on identifying and fixing issues related to open data detection in the database for those years. No other branches were modified in this set of commits, and the changes were limited to the ontogenerator in the `main` branch. The work was confined to a single commit, which targeted debugging a specific aspect of the database. There were no additions of new features or modules in this set of commits, only a debugging effort.

1 commit(s) today:

  • f2850fe [main] debugging open data detection db 2023-2024 — ontogenerator

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 6 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The main branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to address various issues. The demo page was updated and a CLI bug was caught, as stated in the commit message "update demo page; caught CLI bug". A bug with the card preview was fixed, according to the commit "fix card preview bug". The survey routes were renamed to avoid interference from ad blockers, as described in the commit "rename survey routes to avoid ad blocker interference", and a related issue was also fixed where the wizard was being incorrectly blocked by ad blockers, as per the commit "fix: wizard incorrectly blocked by ad blockers". Additionally, the CHANGELOG.md file was updated, and an issue with an iframe remnant was handled, as noted in the commit "handle iframe remenant issue".

6 commit(s) today:

  • ffb127a [main] update demo page; caught CLI bug — Jamie Cummins
  • 722db8f [main] fix card preview bug — Jamie Cummins
  • 4f8871e [main] rename survey routes to avoid ad blocker interference — Jamie Cummins
  • 41a3c91 [main] fix: wizard incorrectly blocked by ad blockers — Jamie Cummins
  • dfc6177 [main] Update CHANGELOG.md — Jamie Cummins
  • 483af6c [main] handle iframe remenant issue — Jamie Cummins
  • 039d789 [main] lock precheck (for now!) — Jamie Cummins
  • 6d3db76 [main] Merge branch 'staging' — Jamie Cummins
  • cceb94d [main] separate precheck as its own app — Jamie Cummins
  • a430ad4 [main] split precheck and regcheck domains — Jamie Cummins
  • 4e45f4f [main] add precheck functionality — Jamie Cummins
  • ad6c3aa [main] remove dimension numbers for defaults — Jamie Cummins
  • c0b987d [main] change RR flow — Jamie Cummins
  • ffa8ea4 [main] strip beta references — Jamie Cummins
  • 2751f19 [main] phase 5 prod prep — Jamie Cummins
  • 5092647 [main] minor additions preclin — Jamie Cummins
  • 820b166 [main] phase 3 prod prep — Jamie Cummins
  • 575f010 [main] commit phase 2 prod push — Jamie Cummins
  • cfeac5d [main] roll back RR overkill — Jamie Cummins
  • 35075aa [main] third phase of RR creation — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
